title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, December 20 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 20/12/2022
Image reference: 2022-12-20_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-december-20-2022_img1.png
Bulkers : Values softened across the Bulker sector
Capesize Lowlands Sunrise (181,500 DWT, Jun 2011, Koyo Dock) sold to Brave Maritime Corporation for USD 23.80 mil, VV Value USD 25.79 mil - BWTS. Panamax Rich Rainforest (82,300 DWT, Jan 2022, Jiangsu Yangzi-Mitsui) sold to unknown Japanese buyers for USD 34.50 mil, VV Value USD 34.38 mil - BBHP. Ultramax Stony Stream (64,000 DWT, Apr 2015, Chengxi Shipyard) sold to Unknown USA for USD 24.50 mil, VV Value USD 22.01 mil - BWTS.
